animal kingdom. Mercury represents a mixture.

प्रयोजनम् शाखेशबले उपनयनादि प्राशास्त्यम्

First half,
Latter half. But according to पराशर

राहारपङ्गचन्द्राश्च विज्ञेया धातुखेचराः ॥
मूलग्रहौ सूर्यशुक्रावपरा जीवसंज्ञकाः ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
राहारपङ्गचन्द्राश्च विज्ञेया धातुखेचराः ॥
मूलग्रहौ सूर्यशुक्रावपरा जीवसंज्ञकाः ॥

content_blocks.text:
दीप्तः स्वस्थः प्रमुदितः शान्तः शक्तः प्रपीडितः ।
दीनः खलस्तु विकलो भीतोऽवस्था दश क्रमात् ॥१६॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
दीप्तः स्वस्थः प्रमुदितः शान्तः शक्तः प्रपीडितः ।
दीनः खलस्तु विकलो भीतोऽवस्था दश क्रमात् ॥१६॥

content_blocks.text:
Blazing, confident (self-possessed), happy,
calm, capable, tortured, dejected, base, failing and afraid
are the words describing the ten conditions of a planet
in their order.

verse_data.translation:
Blazing, confident (self-possessed), happy,
calm, capable, tortured, dejected, base, failing and afraid
are the words describing the ten conditions of a planet
in their order.

content_blocks.text:
बोच्चत्रिकोणोपगतः प्रदीप्तः स्वस्थः स्वगेहे मुदितः सुहृद्धे ।
ग्रान्तस्तु सौम्यग्रहवर्गयातः शक्तोतिशुद्धः स्फुटरश्मिजालैः ॥१७॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
बोच्चत्रिकोणोपगतः प्रदीप्तः स्वस्थः स्वगेहे मुदितः सुहृद्धे ।
ग्रान्तस्तु सौम्यग्रहवर्गयातः शक्तोतिशुद्धः स्फुटरश्मिजालैः ॥१७॥

content_blocks.text:
A planet is blazing when he is in his
exaltation or Moolatrikona; he is confident in his own
house; happy in a friend's house; calm, when he has
reached the varga of a benefic planet. He is capable
when he shines bright with unclouded splendour.

verse_data.translation:
A planet is blazing when he is in his
exaltation or Moolatrikona; he is confident in his own
house; happy in a friend's house; calm, when he has
reached the varga of a benefic planet. He is capable
when he shines bright with unclouded splendour.

content_blocks.text:
He is tortured when overcome by
another planet. He is exceedingly dejected when he
occupies an Amsa (अंश) or portion belonging to an ene
my's sign He is base by union with the Varga of a male-
fic planet. He is greatly afraid when he is in his de-
pression. He is failing when he has set or disappeared.

verse_data.translation:
He is tortured when overcome by
another planet. He is exceedingly dejected when he
occupies an Amsa (अंश) or portion belonging to an ene
my's sign He is base by union with the Varga of a male-
fic planet. He is greatly afraid when he is in his de-
pression. He is failing when he has set or disappeared.

मातकपोरजोत
Adh. II
character of a root. Venus and Jupiter represent the
animal kingdom. Mercury represents a mixture.
First half, प्रयोजनम् शाखेशबले उपनयनादि प्राशास्त्यम्
Latter half. But according to पराशर
राहारपङ्गचन्द्राश्च विज्ञेया धातुखेचराः ॥
मूलग्रहौ सूर्यशुक्रावपरा जीवसंज्ञकाः ॥
दीप्तः स्वस्थः प्रमुदितः शान्तः शक्तः प्रपीडितः ।
दीनः खलस्तु विकलो भीतोऽवस्था दश क्रमात् ॥१६॥
बोच्चत्रिकोणोपगतः प्रदीप्तः स्वस्थः स्वगेहे मुदितः सुहृद्धे ।
ग्रान्तस्तु सौम्यग्रहवर्गयातः शक्तोतिशुद्धः स्फुटरश्मिजालैः ॥१७॥
हाअिभूतस्त्वतिपीडितः स्यादटरातिराश्यंशगतोतिदीनः ।
बलस्तु पापग्रहवर्गयोगानीचेतिभीतो विकलोऽस्तयातः ॥१८॥
